home.headline: Focused on Quality, Architecture, and Scalability
home.hero_subtitle: Hi, I'm Nam — an Android Engineer with 10+ years of experience building reliable, maintainable mobile applications.

about.title: About Me

left_info.title: PHILOSOPHY
info: Work for money but Dev for love

left_info.title: CONTACT
info: Ho Chi Minh City, Viet Nam

about.text: I am an Android Engineer with over a decade of experience working on mobile applications across fintech, media streaming, and consumer platforms. My work centers on designing systems that remain maintainable as they scale, improving code quality through architectural refactoring, and building reliable user experiences in production environments.
about.text_short: Strong background in Android development with a focus on building systems that remain maintainable as they evolve. Experienced in applying Clean Architecture and modular design to manage complexity, structuring codebases for scalability, and handling complex UI flows and state management. Proficient in asynchronous programming with Coroutines and RxJava, as well as integrating and maintaining robust API layers. Emphasizes code clarity, long-term maintainability, and continuous refactoring to support stable product growth.

experience.description: Mentor learners in software development through code reviews, technical guidance, and project support, helping them strengthen programming fundamentals and problem-solving skills.
Deliver Android consulting services for client projects, focusing on codebase modernization, architecture improvements, bug fixing, and performance optimization across existing mobile applications.

Develop and maintain core features for a digital banking application, including onboarding, account services, in-app chat, QR code flows, NFC payments, split bills, and money pots. Led the migration from MVP to MVVM and supported modularization efforts to improve code quality, maintainability, and scalability.

Led Android development for MyTV streaming platforms across mobile and Android TV. Worked on Live TV and VOD features, improved playback stability with ExoPlayer, strengthened application architecture, and guided a small Android team through code reviews and technical direction.

Developed and maintained Android applications for international clients across multiple domains, contributing to feature delivery, architectural improvements, and long-term maintainability in projects built with MVVM and Clean Architecture.

Contributed to the development of Pizza Hut ordering and delivery applications for multiple markets, including restaurant in-table ordering and customer-facing mobile ordering flows, with a focus on stable feature delivery and maintainable implementation.
Worked on Android applications across music streaming, communication, and enterprise domains, handling feature development, maintenance, bug fixing, and performance improvements for client products.

projects.name: Lifestyle Plus
projects.description: A lifestyle and rewards platform integrated within a digital banking ecosystem, offering users personalized offers, wellness programs, and loyalty benefits through a seamless mobile experience.

projects.name: KitchenPal
projects.description: A smart kitchen companion that helps users manage groceries, track expiration dates, and reduce food waste with intelligent reminders and food organization features.

projects.name: MyTV Net
projects.description: A comprehensive OTT streaming platform delivering live TV channels and on-demand content, with features such as catch-up TV, program schedules, and multi-device viewing.

projects.name: MyTV OTT
projects.description: A mobile streaming application providing access to live television and a wide range of on-demand entertainment content, designed for convenient viewing anytime, anywhere.

projects.name: PH Delivery & Takeaway (VN)
projects.description: An online food ordering application that enables users to browse menus, customize orders, and arrange delivery or takeaway, offering a convenient and seamless ordering experience.
